allow: PowerShell(npm audit --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.vulnerabilities.PSObject.Properties | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): sev=$\($_.Value.severity\) range=$\($_.Value.range\) fixAvailable=$\($_.Value.fixAvailable\)" } })
PowerShell(npm view quill versions --json | ConvertFrom-Json | Where-Object { $_ -match '^2\\.' })
